$comment: Shared MCP configuration template for stock-peg project. Copy to: .codebuddy/mcp-config.json, .cursor/mcp.json, or VSCode settings

playwright.$comment: Browser automation - navigate, screenshot, click, fill forms

filesystem.$comment: File system operations - read, write, search. Replace ${PROJECT_ROOT} with actual path

github.$comment: GitHub integration - repos, issues, PRs. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var

brave-search.$comment: Web search via Brave API. Requires BRAVE_API_KEY env var

setup: 1. Copy this template to your tool's config location:
- VSCode: Add to claude.mcpServers in settings.json
3. Set environment variables for API keys:
5. Verify: MCP tools should appear with 'mcp__' prefix
disable_server: To disable a server, remove it from mcpServers object or set disabled: true
security: NEVER commit API keys to version control
This template file is safe to commit (uses ${} placeholders)
